_comment: Plan 07-01 Task 2 — email reply-stripping fixtures (RESEARCH §8 6 cases). Synthetic.

cases.description: Gmail-style `On <date> X wrote:` plus `>` quoted lines.
cases.body:
Thanks — I'll get back to you with the revised numbers tomorrow.

On Mon, May 12, 2026 at 9:14 AM, Sarah Chen <sarah@example.com> wrote:
> Can you send the Q3 forecast by EOW?
> Thanks.
cases.visible_contains: I'll get back to you with the revised numbers tomorrow
cases.visible_excludes: Can you send the Q3 forecast by EOW?

cases.body:
Approved — please proceed.

From: Sarah Chen <sarah@example.com>
Sent: Monday, May 12, 2026 9:14 AM
To: Alex <alex@example.com>
Subject: Q3 forecast

Can you send the Q3 forecast by EOW?
cases.visible_excludes_optional: Can you send the Q3 forecast by EOW?

cases.description: Top-poster with no quoted reply markers — entire body is visible.

cases.body:
Très bien, je te confirme avant vendredi.

Le lun. 12 mai 2026 à 09:14, Sarah Chen <sarah@example.com> a écrit :
> Peux-tu envoyer la prévision Q3 avant la fin de la semaine ?
cases.visible_contains: Très bien, je te confirme avant vendredi

cases.description: Signature delimited by `-- \n` should be stripped.
cases.body:
Got it, thanks.

-- 
Alex Doe
CEO, Example Co.
alex@example.com
+1 555 0100

cases.description: User interleaves replies inside the quoted block — those lines must survive (Pitfall 6).
cases.body:
Thanks for the questions — answers inline:

> Can we confirm Q3 headcount?
Yes, holding at 42 FTE.
> What about the APAC office?
Free seat goes in via side letter, no material change.
> When does legal need a draft?
Friday EOD.
visible_contains_all: Free seat goes in via side letter
